wins.event: Q1 revenue $7.4B, +36% YoY; net income +55% YoY; 4th consecutive quarter of accelerating growth
Data Center revenue $3.7B, +57% YoY; server CPU share gains; 5th consecutive share-gain quarter
Oracle multibillion-dollar partnership announced for MI355X cluster
Client revenue +68% YoY; record CPU ASP; 5 consecutive quarters of client share gains
ZT Systems acquisition completed; rack-level AI solutions capability online

risks.event: New US export controls on Instinct MI308X to China announced — material new headwind
Macro/regulatory uncertainty around tariffs explicitly noted as potential headwind
Gaming revenue -30% YoY on weak semi-custom sales
Embedded revenue -3% YoY; only gradual recovery; H2 2025 return to growth expected

guidance.notes: 2025 strong double-digit percentage revenue growth maintained despite China export controls; growth tailwinds from MI350 / Turin / Ryzen 'more than offset' the headwinds per management.

_notes: Strong execution but first major regulatory headwind appears (MI308X China export control). Management reaffirms full-year guidance, claiming product portfolio offsets.
